texts: Fixed an issue that caused the currently selected responses in the popularity poll to reset when swapping tabs or window focus.
Fixed an issue with the response count when displaying the popularity poll's results.
Changed the way comments are displayed in the popularity poll results.
Removed Lifetime Stew Sinclair from the general extractable E.G.O pool in the Extraction Simulator.
Made the APR 2026 page available in the archive.
